reasoning: Multiple converging pieces of evidence indicate Haley Stevens announced her Michigan Senate candidacy before May 1, 2025: (1) Stevens explicitly committed in February (Axios) to announce her decision in April; (2) April 10 reports (Punchbowl News) stated she was telling Democrats she would imminently launch; (3) April 17 reports (Detroit News) said she was widely expected to join soon; (4) Washington Post article dated April 21, 2025 states "Haley Stevens is running for Michigan's open Senate seat" - this appears to be a formal announcement report published exactly on the knowledge cutoff date. The timeline consistency across sources and the specificity of the Washington Post reporting provide high confidence that an announcement occurred within the specified timeframe.
